brief.audience: young adults seeking emotional reflection through dream journaling
brief.businessGoal: 情绪觉察工具 - 帮助用户通过记录梦境来觉察情绪、促进自我反思
brief.core_principle: Dreams are not answers, they are emotional entry points - respect user's self-reflection ability

output.previewStrategy: Generate a Canvas HTML workspace file after generation tools are enabled.

artifacts.purpose: 高保真交互原型 - 夜信情感后护理应用，包含6个核心页面：首页沉浸星空、写信、寄送动画、回信镜像、星图、发现页
requirements: 全屏Canvas沉浸式星空背景（多层星星+星云流动+柔光月亮+流星）
深色梦幻美学：深蓝/紫色调 + 金色点缀 + 暖色月光
响应式移动端优先布局（375-414px宽度优化）
星图页支持点击星星查看梦境详情
回信页简化为单一情绪镜像，无版本选择器
性能优化：减少Canvas渲染负担确保流畅加载

designDirection.styleSource: 沉浸梦幻风 - 深色星空 + 金色点缀 + 柔光月亮 + 星云流动

interaction.primaryFlow: 首页 → 写信 → 寄送(2.8s) → 回信 → 收好返回首页

acceptanceCriteria: Generated artifact is responsive and has no obvious text overlap or clipped primary controls.
Primary actions, input controls, empty/loading/error states, and key content are visible and grounded in the brief.
Design quality check has P0=0 and all P1 issues are fixed or explicitly waived.
Canvas starfield renders smoothly on mobile browsers with optimized performance
Touch parallax interaction works responsively on touch devices

risks: Canvas动画在低端设备可能卡顿 - 已优化星星数量从300降至200
回信文案需要平衡'被看见'和'不给答案'的微妙度
星图洞察文案避免过于抽象，需更直白易懂

skill.title: dashboard
skill.rationale: mode matches prototype; design intelligence favors dashboard/data workflow

styleReference.rationale: preview language overlaps brief; popular reference; SaaS product fit

requiredReads.reason: Baseline AI-slop guardrail for all Canvas design artifacts.
Baseline typography quality rule for visual execution.
Baseline color quality rule for visual execution.
Design Plan Mode execution and runtime contract.
Skill metadata and resource selection contract.

abstract: 这个计划将创建一个高保真移动端原型「夜信 Night Letter」，面向希望通过记录梦境进行情绪觉察的年轻用户群体。产品核心理念是'梦不是答案，是情绪入口'——尊重用户的自我思考能力，不提供标准答案，只做情绪镜像。视觉风格采用沉浸式梦幻美学：深色星空背景（Canvas多层星星+星云流动）、柔光月亮、金色点缀、暖色月光。包含6个核心页面：首页沉浸星空、写信、寄送动画、回信镜像、星图可视化（可点击交互）、模式发现。输出目标为HTML单文件原型，移动端优先响应式设计，已做性能优化确保流畅体验。批准前请确认：受众定位、产品目标、视觉方向、输出格式是否符合预期。
